name: Our Last Conversation
short_description: Our Last Conversation is an RPG Maker Horror 2D side scrolling game.  Main character is two of friends who come abandon school. And this place isn't safe enough to let us think about that it has many things don't like that we are alive.
detailed_description:
Our Last Conversation is an RPG Maker Horror 2D side scrolling game.  Main character is two of friends who come to do something that one of them want but that one won't tell us what it is no matter what. But this place isn't safe enough to let us think about that it has many things don't like that we are alive.

Try to survive from the thing that want we stay with them or try to take our life. Would everyone escape from there or stay with them forever? 

-Escape and hide from hunter.

-Play with cat to make you calm down and remember the thing.

-Controle your heart while you hide.

-Try to not die from ghosts.

-Average playtime: 90–120 minutes.
